title: The Crew Splits Up
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on the crew splits up, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Crew Splits Up. The crew enters Alubarna and splits into separate fights against Baroque Works’ strongest agents. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I see it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We're still a ways off... But that's Alubarma, no doubt about it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Kouza!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We're set to arrive at the capital in 30 minutes or less!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Right!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Alubanna is close! Time to raise your fighting spirits, comrades!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ohhh!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Com- Mander Chaka! Rebels sighted 15km south of here!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I want the east, West, South, Southeast, and South-West Gates completely fortified!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Don't let a single Rebel set foot in the capital!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Western Gates of Alubarma

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: South-I eastern Gates

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: W-whoa, whoa, whoa! Are you kidding me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are the princess and the pirates even going to show up?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You can already hear the rebels from here!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: At this rate, the rebels are going to get here first!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Aretheyeventryin' tostopthisrebellion or what!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There's a good chance they won't make it here before the rebels.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: After all, they lost a lot of time being tied up in Rainbase.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Heeertree #eeeyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Oh really!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So if the rebels get here before they do,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Then just what are we supposed to do...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...There's nothing we really need to do in that case.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Once a battle starts, then there's nothing someone can do to stop it, even if it's the princess!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Blow

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Our objective remains unchanged.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We'll eliminate the princess as ordered by the boss.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Can't okamas even make such simple judgments?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: You sayin' you want a taste of my okama kenpo!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Knock it off, you two.

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Ack! Myhip! Mr. 4! Massageme A.S.A.P.!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Heeeeerree...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Theeeeyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He was...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Coooo...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Mmmee...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Tell us sooner, you slow- witted slow- poke!

summary: This part develops the crew splits up and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
